result: If I could change the world in one way, I would amplify our capacity for empathy—the ability to truly understand and share the feelings of others. So many of our challenges, from conflict to inequality, stem from a failure to see the world through another’s eyes. If empathy were as fundamental to our nature as breathing, cooperation would eclipse competition, compassion would override cruelty, and we might finally treat the planet and every being on it with the care they deserve.
